/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -miphoneos-version-min=15.0 -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/static_minigzip.dir/minigzip.c.o -o static_minigzip.app/static_minigzip  ../libz.a
